texto: If every Christian family in the United States would simply commit to pray and ask God if HE wants to use them to bless a child without a family, well, we'd change the world. If we can get the church to think about adoption not in terms of the desires of adults but in terms of the needs of children, I think we'd see on a much grander scale how God sets the lonely in families.
explicacao: Citação de Kelly Rosati sobre temas ligados a familia. “If every Christian family in the United States would simply commit to pray and ask God if HE want…” articula familia, adoption, church em registro de familia, com relevância para contextos como mudanca e church.
